exclusions.name: aten::_cudnn_init_dropout_state
exclusions.reason: CUDA-only internal dropout state helper; not relevant to generic backend conformance.

exclusions.name: ^aten::.*cudnn.*$
exclusions.reason: Vendor cuDNN dispatcher helpers have many exact overload names across PyTorch releases; regex is used because generic backend conformance should test public ATen behavior, not CUDA cuDNN-private entrypoints.

exclusions.name: ^aten::.*miopen.*$
exclusions.reason: Vendor MIOpen dispatcher helpers have many exact overload names across PyTorch releases; regex is used because generic backend conformance should test public ATen behavior, not ROCm MIOpen-private entrypoints.

exclusions.name: ^aten::.*mkldnn.*$
exclusions.reason: Vendor MKLDNN dispatcher helpers have many exact overload names across PyTorch releases; regex is used because generic backend conformance should test public ATen behavior, not CPU MKLDNN-private entrypoints.

exclusions.name: ^aten::.*mps.*$
exclusions.reason: Vendor MPS dispatcher helpers have many exact overload names across PyTorch releases; regex is used because generic backend conformance should test public ATen behavior, not Apple MPS-private entrypoints.

exclusions.name: ^aten::.*nnpack.*$
exclusions.reason: Vendor NNPACK dispatcher helpers have exact overload names that can move across PyTorch releases; regex is used because generic backend conformance should test public ATen behavior, not NNPACK-private entrypoints.

exclusions.name: ^aten::fbgemm_.*$
exclusions.reason: FBGEMM packed-kernel dispatcher helpers have multiple exact overloads; regex is used because these are CPU FBGEMM-private entrypoints, while generic backend conformance should cover public quantized and linear behavior.

exclusions.name: ^aten::_triton_.*$
exclusions.reason: Triton-private dispatcher helpers have multiple exact overloads; regex is used because generic backend conformance should cover public attention surfaces rather than implementation-specific Triton kernels.

exclusions.name: ^aten::_cslt_.*$
exclusions.reason: cuSparseLt-private dispatcher helpers have multiple exact overloads; regex is used because generic backend conformance should cover public sparse/matmul behavior rather than CUDA library-private packing helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_propagate_xla_data
exclusions.reason: XLA data propagation is specific to the XLA bridge and is not a generic ATen backend conformance surface.

exclusions.name: aten::_fused_dropout
exclusions.reason: Internal fused dropout dispatcher surface is not generically callable on CPU; public dropout and native_dropout surfaces are covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::_fused_dropout.out
exclusions.reason: Internal fused dropout out variant is not safe for generic direct invocation; public dropout and native_dropout behavior is covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::_empty_affine_quantized
exclusions.reason: CPU-only internal quantized allocation helper; generic backend conformance is covered through public quantized construction and qparam surfaces.

exclusions.name: aten::_make_dep_token
exclusions.reason: Internal dependency-token factory used for dispatcher/autograd plumbing, not a tensor data factory a backend should implement generically.

exclusions.name: ^aten::_test_.*$
exclusions.reason: PyTorch dispatcher test-only operators have many exact overload names; regex is used because these are internal framework test fixtures, not backend conformance surfaces.

exclusions.name: ^aten::_foobar.*$
exclusions.reason: PyTorch foobar dispatcher fixtures have exact overload variants; regex is used because these are internal test fixtures, not backend conformance surfaces.

exclusions.name: aten::is_distributed
exclusions.reason: Distributed runtime state query is not a tensor backend conformance surface and is covered by distributed/runtime integration tests when that capability is in scope.

exclusions.name: aten::from_file
exclusions.reason: File-backed CPU storage factory has CPU-only dispatch and cannot validate generic accelerator backend allocation semantics.

exclusions.name: aten::from_file.out
exclusions.reason: File-backed CPU storage out variant has CPU-storage semantics and cannot validate generic accelerator backend allocation behavior.

exclusions.name: aten::get_gradients
exclusions.reason: Distributed autograd context query requires distributed autograd initialization and is not a generic backend tensor factory.

exclusions.name: aten::_unsafe_index.Tensor
exclusions.reason: Unsafe indexing helper bypasses public validation semantics; index and index_put public surfaces are covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::_unsafe_index_put
exclusions.reason: Unsafe index-put helper bypasses public validation semantics; index_put public surfaces are covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::_unsafe_view
exclusions.reason: Unsafe view helper bypasses public view validation; reshape/view behavior is covered through public alias and copy surfaces.

exclusions.name: aten::_unsafe_view.out
exclusions.reason: Unsafe view out helper bypasses public view validation; reshape/view behavior is covered through public alias and copy surfaces.

exclusions.name: aten::unsafe_split.Tensor_out
exclusions.reason: Unsafe split Tensor[] out helper requires list-output alias handling and bypasses public split validation; safe split surfaces are covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::unsafe_split_with_sizes.out
exclusions.reason: Unsafe split-with-sizes Tensor[] out helper requires list-output alias handling and bypasses public split validation; safe split surfaces are covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_coo_tensor_unsafe
exclusions.reason: Unsafe sparse COO constructor bypasses invariant checks; sparse COO behavior must be tested through public sparse constructor helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_compressed_tensor_unsafe
exclusions.reason: Unsafe sparse compressed constructor bypasses invariant checks; compressed sparse behavior must be tested through public sparse constructor helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_csr_tensor_unsafe
exclusions.reason: Unsafe sparse CSR constructor bypasses invariant checks; CSR behavior must be tested through public sparse constructor helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_csc_tensor_unsafe
exclusions.reason: Unsafe sparse CSC constructor bypasses invariant checks; CSC behavior must be tested through public sparse constructor helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_bsr_tensor_unsafe
exclusions.reason: Unsafe sparse BSR constructor bypasses invariant checks; BSR behavior must be tested through public sparse constructor helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_bsc_tensor_unsafe
exclusions.reason: Unsafe sparse BSC constructor bypasses invariant checks; BSC behavior must be tested through public sparse constructor helpers.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_log_softmax.Dimname
exclusions.reason: PyTorch named-tensor sparse dimname dispatcher is not safely invokable through torch.ops, and the named sparse public API is still incomplete; sparse named behavior should be revisited when PyTorch named tensor support is implemented for this surface.

exclusions.name: aten::_sparse_softmax.Dimname
exclusions.reason: PyTorch named-tensor sparse dimname dispatcher is not safely invokable through torch.ops, and the named sparse public API is still incomplete; sparse named behavior should be revisited when PyTorch named tensor support is implemented for this surface.

exclusions.name: aten::align_tensors
exclusions.reason: torch.align_tensors raises not-yet-implemented in PyTorch 2.12, while direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; implemented named alignment surfaces are covered through public align_to and align_as tests.

exclusions.name: aten::all.dimname_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.all with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; revisit when PyTorch enables this named reduction overload.

exclusions.name: aten::any.dimname_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.any with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; revisit when PyTorch enables this named reduction overload.

exclusions.name: aten::gather.dimname_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.gather with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; index and gather integer-dim behavior remains covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::index_copy_.dimname
exclusions.reason: Public index_copy_ with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; implemented named index_fill_ behavior is covered through public tests.

exclusions.name: aten::index_select.dimname
exclusions.reason: Public index_select with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; integer-dim index_select behavior remains covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::index_select.dimname_out
exclusions.reason: Public index_select with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; integer-dim index_select out behavior remains covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::norm.names_dtype_out
exclusions.reason: Public norm with a named dim routes to linalg_vector_norm and rejects string dimensions in PyTorch 2.12; direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe, so this should be revisited when PyTorch implements the public named norm overload.

exclusions.name: aten::norm.names_out
exclusions.reason: Public norm with a named dim routes to linalg_vector_norm and rejects string dimensions in PyTorch 2.12; direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe, so this should be revisited when PyTorch implements the public named norm overload.

exclusions.name: aten::rand.generator_with_names_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.rand rejects the combined names plus out argument form in PyTorch 2.12, while direct dispatcher invocation is not a safe public named-tensor path; rand with names and rand with out are covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::rand.names_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.rand rejects the combined names plus out argument form in PyTorch 2.12, while direct dispatcher invocation is not a safe public named-tensor path; rand with names and rand with out are covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::randn.generator_with_names_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.randn rejects the combined names plus out argument form in PyTorch 2.12, while direct dispatcher invocation is not a safe public named-tensor path; randn with names and randn with out are covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::randn.names_out
exclusions.reason: Public torch.randn rejects the combined names plus out argument form in PyTorch 2.12, while direct dispatcher invocation is not a safe public named-tensor path; randn with names and randn with out are covered separately.

exclusions.name: aten::squeeze_.dimname
exclusions.reason: Public squeeze_ with a named dim raises not-yet-supported in PyTorch 2.12, and direct named tensor torch.ops invocation is unsafe; non-mutating named squeeze behavior is covered through public tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_fill_mem_eff_dropout_mask_
exclusions.reason: Memory-efficient dropout mask filler is an internal helper with seed/offset protocol details; public dropout, native_dropout, and deterministic in-place dropout variants are covered directly.

exclusions.name: aten::_flash_attention_forward_no_dropout_inplace
exclusions.reason: Flash-attention no-dropout in-place helper is an accelerator-specific internal kernel surface; generic backend conformance should cover public scaled-dot-product attention and flash-attention capability tests instead.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_key_fold_in
exclusions.reason: Philox key folding is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic RNG conformance is covered through public random, normal, uniform, and generator tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_key_split
exclusions.reason: Philox key splitting is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic RNG conformance is covered through public random, normal, uniform, and generator tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_normal
exclusions.reason: Philox normal generation is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic normal-distribution conformance is covered through public normal and randn surfaces.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_normal.out
exclusions.reason: Philox normal out variant is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic normal-distribution conformance is covered through public normal and randn out/public surfaces.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_normal_
exclusions.reason: Philox normal in-place variant is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic in-place RNG conformance is covered through public normal and distribution tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_uniform
exclusions.reason: Philox uniform generation is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic uniform RNG conformance is covered through public uniform, rand, and generator tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_uniform.out
exclusions.reason: Philox uniform out variant is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic uniform RNG conformance is covered through public uniform, rand, and generator tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_philox_uniform_
exclusions.reason: Philox uniform in-place variant is an MPS/Meta-only internal RNG helper in PyTorch 2.12 and has no CPU reference kernel; generic in-place uniform RNG conformance is covered through public uniform, rand, and generator tests.

exclusions.name: aten::_sobol_engine_draw
exclusions.reason: Raw Sobol engine draw helper requires internal quasi-random engine state protocol and direct probing can abort the test process; add public SobolEngine coverage before revisiting this internal dispatcher surface.

exclusions.name: aten::_sobol_engine_ff_
exclusions.reason: Raw Sobol fast-forward helper mutates internal quasi-random engine state and direct probing can abort the test process; add public SobolEngine coverage before revisiting this internal dispatcher surface.

exclusions.name: aten::_sobol_engine_initialize_state_
exclusions.reason: Raw Sobol state initializer mutates internal quasi-random engine state and direct probing can abort the test process; add public SobolEngine coverage before revisiting this internal dispatcher surface.

exclusions.name: aten::_sobol_engine_scramble_
exclusions.reason: Raw Sobol scramble helper mutates internal quasi-random engine state and direct probing can abort the test process; add public SobolEngine coverage before revisiting this internal dispatcher surface.

exclusions.name: aten::_functional_assert_async.msg
exclusions.reason: Functional async assertion consumes dispatcher dependency tokens and validates compiler/runtime ordering, not backend tensor data semantics; dependency-token creation is excluded separately.

exclusions.name: aten::_functional_assert_scalar
exclusions.reason: Functional scalar assertion consumes dispatcher dependency tokens and validates compiler/runtime ordering, not backend tensor data semantics; dependency-token creation is excluded separately.

exclusions.name: aten::_functional_sym_constrain_range

exclusions.name: aten::_functional_sym_constrain_range_for_size

exclusions.name: aten::_autocast_to_reduced_precision

exclusions.name: aten::indices_copy.out
